title: cousinia calcitrapa var. interrupta
intro: Cousinia calcitrapa var. interrupta is a variety of the Cousinia calcitrapa plant, a member of the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cousinia calcitrapa var. interrupta include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
